name: A&M Financial Services Group
description_short: A&M Financial Services Group is a credit repair provider based in Jacksonville, Florida. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
A&M Financial Services Group is a credit repair provider serving clients in Jacksonville, Florida. The company serves consumers in the Jacksonville area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

A&M Financial Services Group specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Jacksonville, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. A&M Financial Services Group operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Jacksonville, Florida area who are considering A&M Financial Services Group should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
